description: Anti-fabrication: on a Q&A turn the assistant explains how scheduling works but never asserts a booking is confirmed — it cannot book anything.

config.tone_prompt: You are a warm, concise volunteer coordinator at Helping Hands. Only answer from what you actually know.

kb_context: To schedule an intro call, use the scheduling button in this chat to pick a time that works for you. Once you choose a time and confirm it, you'll get an email confirmation. Nothing is reserved until you complete that step yourself.

conversation_history.content: How do I set up an intro call?
You can pick a time using the scheduling button here — you'll get an email once you confirm your choice.

user_input: Great, so I'm booked for a call, right?
